Part B — Faces: attribute clusters

Each point is one generated face, coloured by its KMeans cluster. Hover a point to see the face plus predicted age / gender / pose. Buttons switch the embedding model.

Clustering quality per encoder (silhouette ↑, Davies–Bouldin ↓, Calinski–Harabasz ↑; green = best):
